mapper.select: SELECT * FROM note_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO note_tag (user_id, name) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, name) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM note_tag t INNER JOIN note_tag_rel r ON t.id = r.tag_id WHERE r.note_id = #{noteId} ORDER BY t.name ASC
